CREATE TABLE keyword_test (id INT, value VARCHAR(255));
SELECT x.value, get_keyword('a', vector('a', 2), -1, 1) FROM (SELECT * FROM another_test AS x) AS y;
SELECT get_keyword(value, vector('data1', 'data2', 'data3', 'data4'), 'NOT FOUND!') FROM complex_test WHERE value = 'data2';
WITH test_vector AS (SELECT vector(1, 'alpha', 2, 'beta', 3, 'gamma') AS vec) SELECT get_keyword('beta', vec, 'NOT FOUND!') FROM test_vector;
